positive: A mystical celestial botanical arrangement. Focus on highly stylized, interlocking elements: deep indigo nebula clouds blending seamlessly with detailed line-art constellations, interwoven with bioluminescent tropical flowers (like stylized lilies and ferns) and ethereal crescent moons. The composition must be centralized, forming a striking mandala-like silhouette. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, sapphire blue, gold leaf accents, and vibrant electric teal. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Minimalism. High detail, clean outlines, perfect symmetry, vector-art quality, suitable for a repeating apparel print.
negative: lowres, blurry, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, disfigured, monochrome only, muddy colors, grayscale, photorealism, cartoon, messy details
